source_note: Patterns in public Aetna clinical-policy bulletins (CPBs) as of 2025; SIMULATED — not authoritative.

common_denial_reasons: indication does not match appropriate-use criteria

required_documents: Indication and question to be answered
common_denial_reasons: repeat within 6 months without interval change
procedures.notes: Frequency criterion: max one per 6 months for stable conditions absent interval change.

procedures.description: Catheter placement in coronary arteries with contrast injection(s)
required_documents: Full non-invasive testing report (stress, MPI, or CTA)
common_denial_reasons: no high-risk findings on non-invasive study
procedures.notes: Aetna CPB requires high-risk noninvasive findings or class I/IIa AUC.

common_denial_reasons: duration mismatch — extended monitoring (>7d) uses different CPT and needs PA
procedures.notes: Aetna caps duration; extended monitoring uses 93241-93248 and requires PA.
